title: Foo Bar Consistent Metrics Layer
description: Fix inconsistent metric definitions across ClickHouse and Postgres. The same metric (e.g. daily_active_users) is computed differently in each store, causing reporting mismatches.

tasks.description: Align metric definitions so daily_active_users and revenue are computed identically in both stores, or consolidate to a single source of truth.

infrastructure.description: Postgres and ClickHouse both have events. Metric definitions differ: Postgres counts distinct user_id per day, ClickHouse uses a different formula. Fix the inconsistency.
